name: Basic Ball
item_effect: +5 to your capture roll.

name: Great Ball
item_effect: +0 to your capture roll.

name: Ultra Ball
item_effect: -5 from your capture roll.

name: Master Ball
item_effect: -100 from your capture roll. The Master Ball can and will often fail when thrown at legendary Pokémon.

name: Park Ball
item_effect: -20 from your capture roll against domesticated wild Pokémon.

name: Safari Ball
item_effect: -20 from your capture roll against domesticated wild Pokémon.

name: Sport Ball
item_effect: -20 from your capture roll against domesticated wild Pokémon.

name: Cherish Ball
item_effect: -5 from your capture roll. Captured Pokémon are more easily befriended.

name: Luxury Ball
item_effect: -5 from your capture roll. Captured Pokémon are more easily befriended.

name: Premier Ball
item_effect: -5 from your capture roll. Captured Pokémon are more easily befriended.

name: Dive Ball
item_effect: -12 from your capture roll if the Pokémon is in water.

name: Dusk Ball
item_effect: -7 from your capture roll if it's night time (no sunlight).

name: Fast Ball
item_effect: -8 from your capture roll on a Pokémon that acts before your Pokémon.

name: Lure Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if you lured the wild Pokémon into combat.

name: Quick Ball
item_effect: -20 from your capture roll if thrown as your first action during combat.

name: Repeat Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll the Pokémon already had a Poké Ball thrown at it this encounter.

name: Timer Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if the encounter has lasted at least one min; -25 from your capture roll if the encounter has lasted at least two mins.

name: Dream Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if the Pokémon is afflicted.

name: Heavy Ball
item_effect: -15 from your capture roll if the Pokémon is Heavy or Superweight.

name: Level Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if the Pokémon can evolve, but is not evolved.

name: Love Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if the target is the opposite sex of your Pokémon.

name: Moon Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if the Pokémon evolves with an evolution stone.

name: Nest Ball
item_effect: -10 from your capture roll if the Pokémon can evolve, but is not evolved.

name: Net Ball
item_effect: -15 from your capture roll when used against a Bug or Water type Pokémon.

name: Friend Ball
item_effect: +0 to your capture roll. Captured Pokémon are more easily befriended.

name: Heal Ball
item_effect: +0 to your capture roll. Captured Pokémon are healed 20 hit points.

name: Potion
item_effect: Heals a Pokémon 10 HP.

name: Super Potion
item_effect: Heals a Pokémon 20 HP.

name: Hyper Potion
item_effect: Heals a Pokémon 30 HP.

name: Max Potion
item_effect: Heals a Pokémon to their Max HP.

name: Full Restore
item_effect: Heals a Pokémon to their Max HP and cures them of any afflictions.

name: Potion Water
item_effect: Heals a human 10 HP.

name: Super Soda
item_effect: Heals a human 20 HP.

name: Hyper Lemonade
item_effect: Heals a human 30 HP.

name: Antidote
item_effect: Cures a Pokémon or human of Poisoning or Toxification.

name: Paralyze Heal
item_effect: Cures a Pokémon or human or Paralysis.

name: Awakening
item_effect: Cures a Pokémon or human of being unnaturally Asleep.

name: Burn Heal
item_effect: Cures a Pokémon or human of Burns.

name: Ice Heal
item_effect: Cures a Pokémon or human of Freezing.

name: Full Heal
item_effect: Cures a Pokémon or human of all afflictions.

name: Ether
item_effect: A Pokémon's strength is partially restored and can again use one of its 1/day or 3/day frequency moves as if it has taken an extended rest.

name: Elixir
item_effect: A Pokémon's strength is restored and can again use its 1/day or 3/day frequency moves as if it taken an extended rest.

name: Revive
item_effect: Restore an unconscious Pokémon to half of its max HP.

name: Max Revive
item_effect: Restore an unconscious Pokémon to its max HP.

name: Repel
item_effect: Wild Pokémon find the smell repulsive for one hour after applied, but may ignore it to protect something precious to them.

name: Super Repel
item_effect: Wild Pokémon find the smell repulsive for three hours after applied, but may ignore it to protect something precious to them.

name: Heal Powder
item_effect: Removes any affliction

name: Energy Powder
item_effect: Recovers 25 Hit Points (Pokémon)

name: Energy Root
item_effect: Recovers 50 Hit Points (Pokémon)

name: Revival Herb
item_effect: Recovers an unconscious Pokémon to half of their max HP.

name: X Attack
item_effect: Increases a Pokémon's Attack by 1 for 2 mins. This effect can stack up to three times.

name: X Defend
item_effect: Increases a Pokémon's Defense by 1 for 2 mins.

name: X Special
item_effect: Increases a Pokémon's Special Attack by 1 for 2 mins. This effect can stack up to three times.

name: X Sp. Def
item_effect: Increases a Pokémon's Special Defense by 1 for 2 mins.

name: X Speed
item_effect: Increases a Pokémon's Speed by 1 for 2 mins. This effect can stack up to three times.

name: X Accuracy
item_effect: Increases a Pokémon's accuracy checks by 1 for 1 min. This effect can stack up to three times.

name: HP Up
item_effect: Permanently increase HP by 4.

name: Protein
item_effect: Permanently increase Attack by 1.

name: Iron
item_effect: Permanently increase Defense by 1.

name: Calcium
item_effect: Permanently increase Special Attack by 1.

name: Zinc
item_effect: Permanently increase Special Defense by 1.

name: Carbos
item_effect: Permanently increase speed by 1.

name: Air Balloon
item_effect: You are immune to Ground-type attacks. If you are hit by any other type of attack, Air Balloon is destroyed.

name: Absorb Bulb
item_effect: When you are hit by a Water-type attack, Absorb Bulb is destroyed and your Special Attack is raised by 2 for 10 mins.

name: Adrenaline Orb
item_effect: When your Attack or Special Attack is lowered by a foe's effects, your Speed is raised by 1 for 10 mins.

name: Assault Vest
item_effect: Your Special Defense is +1. You may not use moves that do not deal damage on hit.

name: Big Root
item_effect: When using an attack that heals you according to how much damage you deal, heal yourself an additional 1d6 hit points.

name: Binding Band
item_effect: When using an attack that deals damage while keeping a target bound, deal an additional 1d4 damage each turn.

name: Black Sludge
item_effect: As an action, consume and destroy Black Sludge. Poison-types that consume Black Sludge regain 1d6 hit points per round for 2 mins (20 rounds) or until at max HP. All other Pokémon are Poisoned by consuming Black Sludge.

name: Cell Battery
item_effect: When you are hit by a Electric-type attack, Cell Battery is destroyed and your Attack is raised by 2 for 10 mins.

name: Choice Band
item_effect: Your Attack is +2. Whenever you make an attack, that is the only attack you can use for 3 mins. If you can no longer use that move, you may still Struggle.

name: Choice Scarf
item_effect: Your Speed is +2. Whenever you make an attack, that is the only attack you can use for 3 mins. If you can no longer use that move, you may still Struggle.

name: Choice Specs
item_effect: Your Special Attack is +2. Whenever you make an attack, that is the only attack you can use for 3 mins. If you can no longer use that move, you may still Struggle.

name: Destiny Knot
item_effect: If you become Infatuated, the Pokémon who Infatuated you becomes Infatuated with you.

name: Elemental Plate
item_effect: Elemental Plates are named per Pokémon type (Bug Plate, Dark Plate, etc.) and empower any of your same-typed attacks, dealing an additional +4 damage.

name: Everstone
item_effect: While held, a Pokémon will not be able to evolve. A Pokémon will also not get exhausted from fighting off evolution while held.

name: Eviolite
item_effect: If you can still potentially evolve, your Defense and Special Defense are +1.

name: Expert Belt
item_effect: If you hit with a super effective or extremely effective attack, deal an additional +4 damage.

name: Focus Band
item_effect: If you would be knocked out, roll 1d20. On 17 or higher, you are instead set to 1 hit point and the Focus Band is destroyed.

name: Focus Sash
item_effect: If you would be knocked out from a single attack when you were at max hit points, instead you are set to 1 hit point once per battle.

name: Heavy Boots
item_effect: You are immune to damage and effects of Hazards once per combat.

name: King's Rock
item_effect: When attacking, you stun targets on natural 18-20. Once you stun a target, King's Rock does not work for the rest of the day.

name: Leftovers
item_effect: As an action, start consuming Leftovers for 1 min (10 rounds) or until at max HP. While consuming Leftovers, regain 10 hp per round. Afterwards, Leftovers is destroyed.

name: Life Orb
item_effect: Whenever using an attack that deals damage on hit, deal an additional 1d6, then you lose that result as unreducible hit points.

name: Mental Herb
item_effect: Consume Mental Herb as an action to become immune for 5 minutes against effects from opponents that would prevent you from using a move.

name: Muscle Band
item_effect: Your Attack is +2 on your first turn each combat.

name: Protective Pads
item_effect: If you would be damaged as a result of making a melee attack against a foe by a foe's effect or ability, ignore that damage.

name: Quick Claw
item_effect: 1/day, you may give one of your moves priority. If someone else uses a priority move, compare Speed for turn order.

name: Razor Claw
item_effect: When attacking, you score a critical hit on a natural roll of 18, 19, or 20. If you score a critical hit, Razor Claw does not work for the rest of the day.

name: Rocky Helmet
item_effect: Whenever you are hit by an attack at melee range, the offender loses 1d4 hit points.

name: Safety Goggles
item_effect: You are immune to damaging effects from weather and powder effect moves.

name: Shell Bell
item_effect: Once per combat, on hit, your damaging attack will also heal you 1d4 hit points.

name: Terrain Extender
item_effect: Terrain Extenders are named per type of terrain and are activated and destroyed when you create that type of terrain. When they are destroyed, the terrain effect lasts for 5 mins.

name: Terrain Seeds
item_effect: Terrain Seeds are named per type of terrain and are activated and destroyed when you step onto that type of terrain. When they are destroyed, your Defense is +1 for 10 mins.

name: Throat Spray
item_effect: Once per day when you use a voice-oriented move, your Special Attack is raised +1 for 10 mins.

name: Weather Rocks
item_effect: Weather Rocks are named per type of weather and are activated and destroyed when you create that type of weather. When they are destroyed, the weather effect lasts for 5 mins.

name: White Herb
item_effect: When consumed and destroyed, remove all of your temporarily lowered stats effects.

name: Wise Glasses
item_effect: Your Special Attack is +2 on your first turn each combat.
